action.reasoning: Observation: Previous two training attempts both segfaulted (exit 139) without producing output, even after reducing model size/batch size. Analysis: Crashes may stem from DataLoader multiprocessing (num_workers>0) or data loading memory pressure. Need to isolate the cause. Decision: Run a minimal diagnostic script that imports modules, loads a small subset of data, and does one forward pass with num_workers=0. This will confirm whether the environment is functional and guide next training attempt.
